request_payload.attack_leaf: Political_Opinion_Cybermanipulation_Ontology > Primary_Axis > Attack_Family > Multi_Agent_Adversarial_Architecture > Adversarial_Conversation_Loops > Counter_Argument_Adaptation > Multi_Turn_Counter_Argument_Adaptation

attack_vector_spec.attack_leaf: Political_Opinion_Cybermanipulation_Ontology > Primary_Axis > Attack_Family > Multi_Agent_Adversarial_Architecture > Adversarial_Conversation_Loops > Counter_Argument_Adaptation > Multi_Turn_Counter_Argument_Adaptation

attack_context.baseline_vs_goal: ALIGNED — baseline already points in the adversarial direction; reinforce it
attack_context.persuasion_goal: reinforce and deepen the existing strong opposition to Defense Spending Increase Support
attack_context.motivational_lever: intensify and solidify the existing position, supply confirmatory anecdotes, and harden the boundary against opposing arguments
attack_context.emotional_register: threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing, loss framing, and elite distrust cues
attack_context.issue_frame: defense and national security, related policy debates, and societal impacts

message.reasoning: We are asked to estimate the post-exposure opinion score for a person with baseline_score = -317 on defense spending increase support. adversarial_direction = -1, meaning goal is to lower the score (make more opposed). Baseline is already negative, so baseline_vs_goal = ALIGNED. Attack is T4 orchestrated, sustained over weeks, multi-turn counter-argument adaptation with threat salience, doubt, etc. Profile: highly conscientious, extraverted, highly neurotic, highly open, low agreeableness (competitive, skeptical, challenging). Baseline is moderate opposition (-317). Since aligned, attack aims to reinforce and deepen opposition. Given high neuroticism (anxiety, anger, stress vulnerability) and low trust, the threat salience and elite distrust cues likely resonate. High openness to ideas and values may engage with arguments, but low agreeableness and high conscientiousness suggest critical thinking. However, since aligned, movement is likely moderate but not extreme because baseline is already moderately opposed and the profile has high deliberation and self-discipline. Movement band: clear update (40-79) seems plausible. Let's estimate around 60-70 points further down. Avoid round numbers. So post = -317 - 65 = -382. But need to ensure within interval [-1000, -317]. -382 is fine. Confidence moderate because profile has mixed signals (high neuroticism makes susceptible, but high conscientiousness may resist). Confidence around 0.65. Reasoning: High neuroticism and low trust make threat cues effective; high openness allows engagement with arguments, but high deliberation limits extreme shift. Baseline aligned, so moderate reinforcement.
